feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to get the link to an Odata service when creating a Fiori elements course ?
entry.content: Trying to follow a tutorial but not sure where to get this link ? Kindly assist

entry.title: Fiori app - Maintain Business Partner; In identification tab can we increase number of rows visible
entry.content: Hi Experts, S/4 by default only displays 5 rows in the Identification Numbers under Identification tab. Is there a way I can make this default to 10.

entry.title: Issue in Creating SAP Fiori Elements List Report Using Parameterized CDS View using OData V4 UI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently developing a Fiori Elements List Report based on a parameterized CDS view in RAP. We have created a parameterized consumption CDS view and binding it using an OData V4 UI service. 

While generating the Fiori Elements List Report application, only the parameters are visible in the App as output fields, and no filters are available. While executing it, we are getting the below error.

 

Below is the CDS View which is created. The parameters are exposed from the base level CDS

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Consumption View for Proj Fin Report'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
define view entity ZPTD_C_PROJ_FIN_REP
  with parameters
    p_bukrs      : bukrs,
    p_perio_from : co_perio,
    p_perio_to   : co_perio,
    p_gjahr_from : gjahr,
    p_gjahr_to   : gjahr,
    p_pc1        : versn,
    p_pc2        : versn
  as select from ZPTD_I_PROJ_FIN_REP( p_bukrs:$parameters.p_bukrs,
                                      p_perio_from:$parameters.p_perio_from ,
                                      p_perio_to:$parameters.p_perio_to ,
                                      p_gjahr_from:$parameters.p_gjahr_from ,
                                      p_gjahr_to:$parameters.p_gjahr_to,
                                      p_pc1:$parameters.p_pc1 ,
                                      p_pc2:$parameters.p_pc2  )
{

While creating an OData V2 service, it is working, and the report is showing all the filters and data is displayed.

Is there any workaround to achieve this using OData V4? We are on S4HANA OP2023 version.

Thanks,

Faiz

entry.title: On Navigation of the itemObject page I wanted to clear the value set of the Macro filter.
entry.content:
We have defined macro filter in the fragment 

 while navigating from one item page to another in the treetable I wanted to clear the macro filter which defined inside the item object page is being cached for other item set  .
 
Below is the code i have wrote. but it is not working for onbeforeBinding if I am calling, if i wrote separate custom action and call the same method it will clear the macro filter .
I suspect do i am doing something wrong with onBeforeBinding .
 
 
routing: {

                /**
                 * Lifecycle hook triggered before binding the view to a new context.
                 * Used here to reset the filter bar state by clearing any existing selections,
                 * ensuring a clean slate for each navigation to this view.
                 *
                 * @Param {Object} oContext - The context object for the upcoming binding.
                 */
                onAfterBinding  : function (oContext) {
                    this.onPressClear();
                }


            }
 
onPressClear: function(){
var oView = this.getView();
var filterBar = oView.byId("ismm.pps.purchasecontracts1::PPS_PurchaseContractItemObjectPage--fe::CustomSubSection::ItemPricingSimulation--idItemPriceSimulateFilterBar");
filterBar.setSelectionVariant(new SelectionVariant());
},

entry.title: Configuring Functional Area for Universal Allocations Fiori Apps
entry.content: I would like to configure field RFAREA Functional Area to be a receiver option when using Universal Allocations Fiori Applications. I have changed the configuration in table V_T811I in order for it to be an option when choosing a receiver in the apps. It's now showing up as an option, but I am getting the error "Field use for mandatory field RFAREA is not maintained correctly (T811I)". The only thing I changed was making it an option as a receiver in the "Field usage in allocation" section in that field's entry in T811I. I have tried changing the configuration to match profit center which is a standard option, and that has not worked either. Any suggestions on how field RFAREA Functional Area should be used in order to use it as a receiver in the Fiori Apps?

entry.title: Diff VHPs for same property in Listreport and object page. SAPUI5 v1.71.74
entry.content:
Im working in SAPUI5 version 1.71.74.I want diff VHPs for same property in Listreport and object page. Also for Object page alone i wnat to send an additional constant input filter.

Valuehelpparameterconstant will not work for me since it is not supported in my Version.

Any ideas on how to go about this?

entry.title: Error Deploying BSP App to S4 Hana Backend error message: No default virus profile active or found.
entry.content: Hi Community, I am trying to deploy BSP app to S4 HANA system via Business Application Studio, After entering Credentials I am getting the below error. how to resolve and deploy without any error.

entry.title: Error on syncing html5 application to content channel
entry.content:
Hi,

I am unable to sync sample apps to content explorer. Below is the error when download the report. I am not sure where to change this.

First, i successfully uploaded my sample application thru BAS.

Then after upload, i navigated to workzone and manually clicked ng Update content button : 

But the application did not appear in the Content Explorer

So i go back to Content Channel and downloaded the report

 

"status": "PARTIAL","contents": { "total": 13, "failed": 1, "status": "PARTIAL", "messages": { "com.sap.mybankdetails": { "error": [ "com.sap.mybankdetails of type: businessapp does not match the schema, dataPath: undefined, message: 'must be equal to one of the allowed values' [ 'OData', 'ODataAnnotation', 'INA', 'XML', 'JSON', 'FHIR', 'http', 'WebSocket' ]" ], "warning": [] } }, "correlationId": "6dae81e3-7dfd-4b1f-7818-c1cc3d5ba917" }

I am really stuck on this.

entry.title: Calling the sap ui5 fiori application as pop up from button click event
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Calling the sap ui5 fiori application as pop up from button click event.

Requirement: Development of one sap ui5 application that should be called from masthead by development button besides "go" in the sap portal 7.5 in the button click.

Can sap ui5 application be integrated in the masthead area of the sap portal as button event or hyperlink?

Thanks

Kaushik

SAP Portal/UI5/Fiori

entry.title: Tree Table loads data only in client operationModeand not in server operationMode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am developing a tree table with basic odata binding and tree annotations(same as given in SDK). However in my case  data is shown only when I use operationMode:'Client'.

 need to filter data based on some Phases, but with  operationMode : client, the filter is ignored.

And when I use operationMode:Server, data is fetched from the backend ,but the table appers blank.

Please find below the xml code -

 <TreeTable id="TreeTableBasic" rowActionCount="1" rows="{

            path : '/MasterscreenSet',      

            parameters : {

            countMode: 'Inline',

            operationMode:'Client',

            numberOfExpandedLevels: '{helperJson>/numberOfExpandedLevels}',

                treeAnnotationProperties : {

                    hierarchyLevelFor : 'HierarchyLevel',

                    hierarchyNodeFor : 'NodeID',

                    hierarchyParentNodeFor : 'ParentNodeID',

                    hierarchyDrillStateFor : 'DrillState'

                }

            }

        }"

        enableSelectAll="false" selectionMode="None" ariaLabelledBy="title" class="teamTableText" rowMode="Interactive" enableBusyIndicator="true"

        busyIndicatorDelay="0" dataReceived="onDataReceived">

Thanks & Regards,

Aastha

SAPUI5 OData  SAP Fiori Makers

entry.title: No Attachments in Screen Maintenance Requests Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I have created maintenance notifications along with attachments via custom code. The attachments are successfully visible in the IW22 transaction, and corresponding entries exist in the TOA01 table.

However, when accessing the same notification through the Fiori app "Screen Maintenance Requests" (App ID: F4072), the attachments are not displayed.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or is aware of a potential resolution? Any guidance on how to ensure attachments appear correctly in the Fiori app would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: HTML5 app not showing in BTP Cockpit After deployed
entry.content:
No error after upload, but the application still not showing in BTP Cockpit > HTML5 Applications.

Here is my MTA.yaml, i am not sure what needs to be adjusted.

_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: SMDTR
description: A simple CAP project.
version: 1.0.0
modules:
- name: SMDTR-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: com.sm.dtr.h5host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - smdtrdtrapp.zip
      name: smdtrdtrapp
      target-path: resources/
- name: smdtrdtrapp
  type: html5
  path: app/smdtr.dtrapp
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: com.sm.dtr.h5host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-plan: app-host
- name: com.sm.dtr.destination
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: false
      init_data:
        instance:
          destinations:
          - Authentication: NoAuthentication
            Name: ui5
            ProxyType: Internet
            Type: HTTP
            URL: https://ui5.sap.com
          existing_destinations_policy: update
      version: 1.0.0
    service: destination
    service-plan: lite
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
  - builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm ci
    - npx cds build --production

entry.title: Upload General Journal Entries Error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Our client want to upload multiple entries using the app "Upload General Journal Entries". However, we need to extend the field with technical name to fulfill the requirements. I have added the required fields, and now it shows error. The extended fields are attached for your understanding. What could be the possible reason of this problem and how I can solve this?

Thank you in advance!

Best Regards,

Kauser

entry.title: SAP FIORI | Timestamp conversion in fiori front end
entry.content:
Hi SAP  Experts,

I've created a timestamp column in the backend by concatenating the creation date (VBAK-ERDAT) and creation time (VBAK-ERZET). The resulting timestamp is in the format YYYYMMDDHHMMSS, and the values are being generated as expected.

Example:

  • Creation Date: April 25, 2025 (20250425)
  • Creation Time: 5:14:06 AM (051406)
  • Timestamp (backend): 20250425051406

    However, after exposing the CDS view through a Fiori application, the timestamp displayed on the frontend appears to have an additional ~5.5 hours added to it.

    Frontend Example:

    • Timestamp displayed: April 25, 2025, 10:44:06 AM (20250425104406)

      It seems that the SAP Gateway or the Fiori frontend is performing a timezone conversion on the timestamp value.

      As per SAP Note 3215029, this behavior aligns with the standard design. The timestamp shown in UI5 applications may differ from backend values depending on the browser's timezone settings.

      Has anyone else encountered a similar issue? Any suggestions or best practices to handle this discrepancy would be greatly appreciated.

      Best regards,

      Mukhtar

entry.title: Why is a portion of my annotation file not being recognized in Fiori adapation project?
entry.content:
Hello all, it seems I have run into a minor issue with a project I am working on (Fiori App: Perform Maintenance Jobs - F5104A) . I have provided a portion of the annotation file fragment that I have been working with. Everything seems to work fine in our Sandbox including previewing the application in terms of hiding standard fields, adding a new field, and rearranging the fields. With everything looking good, the team was ready to move forward with the local annotation file change but once we added it to the launchpad as a tile (still in our sandbox), the arrangement of the fields do not match what we initially arranged in BAS in preview. Is there are reason the field rearrangement works as expected in preview, but not when we create a tile for the new variant on the launchpad? When the tile is launched the app variant recognizes all the annotations but the rearrangement of fields.

When opening the application in our Sandbox environment from preview in BAS, it works as expected with the fields in the correct order:

After creating technical / business catalogs, our new tile containing the variant does not recognize the rearrangement of fields:

Annotation file with the rearranged fields:

Additionally, we went ahead to recreate this is in our development environment, and the rearrangement of fields does not even work in preview like it does in our Sandbox. 

Any ideas what's going on between preview, the launchpad, and systems? The code is entirely the same in both systems, and both previews do not show the same results. 

Please let me know!

Regards,

Patrick

entry.title: how to display technical field name on Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

 

On Fiori when we press F1 , the technical field name not show as picture attached.

pls advise how to display technical field name on Fiori?

is this the same field name as on SAPGUI or new table field?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: manifest.json always 404 in launchpad
entry.content:
Hi,

Deployment of UI always leading to the following issue. Data is not properly loaded. Upon checking web console. manifest.json always not found. 

https://<mydomain>.launchpad.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/<randomid1>.comsmtesservice.comsmtes/~<randomid1>~/manifest.json?sap-language=EN - always 404 in console

but in BAS, app is working properly. Here is another error on the console.

I am attaching my manifest and component.

entry.title: Sending notifications inside Fiori after using send object with note
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
In T-code me23n when "send object with note" is used, notification is sent in sap business workplace.
How can this notification be sent in my inbox or push notification in Fiori as well?

entry.title: SAP CAP ValueList Displaying a deep value list
entry.content:
This is my current code for the entity Trainee.

entity Trainee {
    key employee : Association to one Employee;
    currentlyLearning : Association to one lpn.LearningPlanEnrollment;
}

And this is the current code for the entity Employee (just so you guys can understand what I'm trying to do)

entity Employee : cuid {
    firstName    : String(100) @mandatory;
    lastName     : String(100);
    name         : String = firstName || ' ' || lastName;
    gender       : Gender @mandatory;
    email        : String(255) @mandatory;
    dateOfBirth  : Date @mandatory;
    batch        : Integer @mandatory;
}

What I'm currently trying to do is to create a value list inside a custom action where it displays all of the information of the employee from the Trainee entity. In other words, I want the value list to not only display the ID, but also the name, gender, email, dateOfBirth, and batch.

But using the annotation, I can't do it, as if the CDS couldn't read it. Instead, I can only reach this far.

... 
   },
    ) actions { 
        enrollTrainees(
            @Common.ValueList : {
                $Type : 'Common.ValueListType',
                CollectionPath : 'Trainees',
                Parameters : [
                    {
                        $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut',
                        LocalDataProperty : trainees,
                        ValueListProperty : 'employee_ID',
                    },
                ],
            }
            trainees
        );
    };
...

 Does anyone have a solution to what I'm trying to do? If using Fiori Elements not possible, is it possible using Fiori Freestyle? Thank you.

entry.title: Standard Fiori Catalogs by Module
entry.content:
Hello,

A customer I'm working with is requesting that I give all standard Fiori authorizations for an SAP module (FI-MM-PP...) to their in-house consultant for that module. I am having difficulty finding any separation of Fiori catalogs based solely on modules. Is it possible to see them grouped that way? 

Thank you for any suggestions in advance
